channel.title: grafana assistant on Nicole van der Hoeven
channel.description: Recent content in grafana assistant on Nicole van der Hoeven

item.title: Evaluating LLM Agents in the Real World: Inside Grafana Assistant
item.description: This video offers a behind-the-scenes look at how we evaluate LLM agents in production at Grafana Labs. Using Grafana Assistant as a case study, I discuss the challenges of evaluating non-deterministic AI systems, the metrics that matter for agent quality, and practical approaches to monitoring and improving AI agent performance over time. The talk covers evaluation frameworks, feedback loops, and lessons learned from running AI agents at scale.
